items.example: I totally agree that technology makes life easier.
I'm not sure about that — some people prefer traditional books.
That's a good point, but not everyone has access to the internet.

items.phrase: I see what you mean, however...
items.translation: Я понимаю, что ты имеешь в виду, однако...
items.example: I see what you mean, however, I think social media has many benefits.
In my experience, online courses are just as effective.
Don't you think that we rely too much on technology?
